notes: No fiscal_kpis in this chunk (null) — all candidates come from the single transcript event.
Single event = Q1 FY2023 earnings call transcript part 1 of 2 (source_id CAKE_2023-05-10T17.00); names coined only from this visible part.

Skipped as vague/banned (8): bare 'macroeconomic uncertainty' (bare category); DoorDash single-delivery-partner discussion (provider label banned, channel covered by delivery_sales_mix); G&A and depreciation (flat, no causal narrative); day_part_mix (mentioned as not changing materially); wage_rates (folded into labor_inflation); real-estate availability (question-only, not addressed); Fortune Best Companies award (sentiment/recognition, not a causal variable); liquidity/debt balances (descriptive, no causal claim).
FRC, North Italia, and Flower Child treated as allowed brand/segment names per R9; Cheesecake Factory itself excluded from names (company legal name).
All quotes verified as exact substrings of the event content.
